data.title: Scalable Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram leverages microservices to efficiently scale its platform to handle massive user loads and data traffic.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes container orchestration tools like Kubernetes to manage microservices across a distributed system.

data.title: Front-End Frameworks
data.description: Frontend interfaces are powered by modern JavaScript frameworks to enhance user interaction.
data.technical_spec: React.js is heavily utilized for building the user interface, allowing dynamic content rendering.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: Data fetching from the backend is streamlined with GraphQL to efficiently query necessary data.
data.technical_spec: Deployed as a layer over RESTful APIs to optimize client-server data transactions.

data.title: NoSQL Data Storage
data.description: Back-end data storage relies on NoSQL databases to manage complex and large datasets.
data.technical_spec: Cassandra is used for its scalability and high availability across multiple data centers.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A global CDN distributes content to users rapidly and reliably.
data.technical_spec: Cloudfront is likely used to cache and serve static content like images and videos efficiently.
